classification_notes.first_year_a: Appeared in the corresponding Novice B roster in 2025.
classification_notes.second_year_a: Appeared in the corresponding Novice A roster in 2025.
classification_notes.prior_a_history: Appeared in the corresponding Novice A program before 2025.
classification_notes.prior_b_history: Appeared in the corresponding Novice B program before 2025.
classification_notes.unknown: No novice history found for that program in the downloaded roster data.

method.headline_metric: Median second-place time, adjusted by same-day course factor
method.index_definition: 100 is the typical pace within the same gender and distance era; above 100 is faster.
method.distance_note: Men Novice B is treated as 1/2 mile through 2023 and 1/4 mile from 2024. Women Novice B is treated as 1/4 mile throughout. Men and Women Novice A remain in one consistent 1/2-mile era.
